scripts.db:generate: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && pnpm --filter @craftdock/backend exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && pnpm --filter @craftdock/backend exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && pnpm --filter @craftdock/backend exec prisma db push
scripts.db:studio: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && pnpm --filter @craftdock/backend exec prisma studio
